annual_rate.notes: Post-judgment interest under ORS 82.010(2) — 9% per year, fixed by statute (simple interest). 9%/yr simple (ORS 82.010(2)(a)). Applies to money judgments; also accrues on pre-judgment interest that accrued before entry, and on attorney fees… Verify against the statute; not legal advice.
